title: Polygon Staking Calculator - Open App
meta_description: polygon staking calculator for modeling POL delegation rewards, validator commission, and timing before opening the official Polygon staking app.
hero_h2: Estimate POL delegation rewards before you open the app
hero_lead: polygon staking calculator helps you model POL delegation assumptions, compare validator variables, and continue to the official Polygon staking app when ready.
what_is: This calculator is a planning layer for POL delegation before you continue to the official Polygon staking app. It does not custody funds or publish guaranteed APY; it helps frame inputs like amount, validator commission, and time horizon.

how.d: Use the amount you are considering for delegation and keep separate funds for wallet transaction fees.
Model time horizon, reward rate assumptions, and validator commission without treating any estimate as guaranteed.
Review validator status, commission, and on-chain activity before delegating.
Continue to staking.polygon.technology, verify the domain, connect your wallet, and sign only the expected transactions.

points.p: Estimate possible outcomes before connecting a wallet or approving a staking transaction.
Delegation results can vary by validator performance, commission, and network reward conditions; use PolygonScan for on-chain context.
The primary action routes to staking.polygon.technology, which is linked from the Polygon official site under staking.

faq.q: What is a polygon staking calculator?
faq.a: It is an estimate tool for modeling POL delegation assumptions before using the official staking interface.

faq.q: Does the polygon staking calculator guarantee rewards?
faq.a: No. Rewards can change with validator performance, network parameters, commissions, and market conditions, so outputs should be treated as estimates only.

faq.q: Where should I stake after using the polygon staking calculator?
faq.a: Use staking.polygon.technology and verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: Which token does the polygon staking calculator use?
faq.a: Polygon's POL token page identifies POL as the network and staking token powering Polygon.

faq.q: Do I need a wallet for the polygon staking calculator workflow?
faq.a: The estimate can be reviewed without custody, but the official staking app requires a compatible wallet and signed transactions to delegate.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify staking.polygon.technology before connecting a wallet. Educational only, not financial advice.
